calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Continued To Mar-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kellyann Estrem appeared by zoom for Danny Williams (Administrator).

The Court noted that there was an ex parte petition to terminate the estate for lack of assets, informed Counsel that terminating the estate cannot be done via ex parte, that it needs to be a petition and notice needs to be given, and that an ex parte petition is not sufficient. Ms. Estrem stated that she will file a petition. Status on close of estate is continued to March 30, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To May-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vernon Goins for Danny Williams (Administrator).

Mr. Goins stated that he filed the notice and a petition yesterday. The Court informed Counsel that it wants courtesy copies of the petition and a proposed order. The Petition for Approval of Status Report is continued to May 29, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-05-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vernon Goins for Danny Williams (Administrator).

Mr. Goins stated that he very recently suffered a death in the family and that he needs more time to close out the estate, that the Administrator had entered into an agreement with his Siblings to purchase their interests in the property, that the reverse mortgage company proceeded with foreclosure without giving notice, and that his Client filed a civil action and it is pending. The Court stated that it is not sure under Probate Code 10501(a) (5) that it was a proper transaction and raised the issue of the sale price being below market value. Mr. Goins stated that the transaction was not consummated, that the Administrator was unable to purchase the property and that the property sold in foreclosure. The Court questions what the foreclosure sale amount was in comparison to what the Administrator was going to purchase it for. Mr. Goins stated that he was not sure how the foreclosure sale amount compares, that there are surplus proceeds that remain are in possession of the Trustee and that the Trustee has contacted the Beneficiaries telling them that he/she has their share. Status on close of estate is continued to February 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Goins is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration no later than January 31, 2019.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vernon Goins for Danny Williams (Administrator).

Mr. Goins stated that at this point in time the petition to close the estate will not be forthcoming anytime soon, that the main asset of the estate sold at public auction, that the Administrator believes it was a wrongful foreclosure, and that the Administrator is in litigation with the lender and the Trustee. Mr. Goins also stated that his Client had entered into an agreement to purchase the other Beneficiaries' interests prior to the foreclosure. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration and request for extended time to administer the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to January 8, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F. Ruiz. Not reported.
